query:
You have access to real-time X (Twitter) data. Search for posts about: Hermes Agent plugin ecosystem

Focus on posts from 2026-06-20 to 2026-07-20. Find 8-12 high-quality, relevant posts.

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format, no other text:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "text": "Post text content (truncated if long)",
      "url": "https://x.com/user/status/...",
      "author_handle": "username",
      "date": "YYYY-MM-DD or null if unknown",
      "engagement": {
        "likes": 100,
        "reposts": 25,
        "replies": 15,
        "quotes": 5
      },
      "why_relevant": "Brief explanation of relevance",
      "relevance": 0.85
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
- relevance is 0.0 to 1.0 (1.0 = highly relevant)
- date must be YYYY-MM-DD format or null
- engagement can be null if unknown
- Include diverse voices/accounts if applicable
- Prefer posts with substantive content, not just links
answer:
